title: Testnet end-to-end: send and receive a shielded payment
description: Manual + automated end-to-end test on Zcash testnet. Steps: (1) init two wallet instances (alice, bob) with testnet HD wallets; (2) fund alice from testnet faucet (instructions in nie-w1e); (3) bob runs /receive, copies UA; (4) alice runs /pay bob 0.001 ZEC; (5) wait for 1 confirmation; (6) verify PaymentAction::Confirmed fires in alice's chat session. Automated portion: write a script that exercises steps 1-6 non-interactively. Use TWO subagents in parallel: subagent-A provisions alice wallet and sends a faucet request; subagent-B provisions bob wallet and polls for incoming payment. Both agents synchronize at the Confirmed event. Defensive programming in test: assert txid is exactly 64 hex chars; assert confirmation fires within 10 minutes (hard timeout, not an infinite wait); clean up test wallet files after assertion.
acceptance_criteria: Script runs non-interactively on testnet, prints PASS with txid and block height. Must be skipped in cargo test --workspace (requires TESTNET_ENABLED=1 env var). Document required env vars in a comment at the top of the test file.
notes: Test framework written in wallet/tests/e2e_testnet.rs. Four #[ignore] tests: lightwalletd connectivity, wallet+address generation, scan-tip advance, and full payment scaffold. Payment test blocked on nie-gw8k (IVK decryption) and agoraold-7766 (Merkle witnesses) which are registered as dependencies. All compile and are ignored by cargo test --workspace.
